title: metastelma lanceolatum
intro: Metastelma lanceolatum, also known as the lanceolate metastelma, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to create herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, which are believed to offer health benefits like reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Additionally, its leaves and roots are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and it is also used to treat gastrointestinal problems.
